name: ask-banner
description: Tier 0 student-facing chatbot for Banner ERP Q&A. Routes questions through sentiment pre-filter, intent classification, and RAG-backed answer retrieval with escalation logic.

nodes.name: Start
nodes.description: Flow entry point — fires on every new user message

nodes.name: Capture Student Message
nodes.description: Capture and store the student's question
nodes.prompt: How can I help you today? You can ask about registration, fees, transcripts, academic holds, or Banner release notes.

nodes.name: Check Sentiment
nodes.description: POST /chat/sentiment — detects frustration before routing to intent

nodes.name: Frustrated Acknowledgement
nodes.description: Acknowledge frustration and offer human escalation

content.text: I can see you're frustrated. Let me connect you with someone who can help directly.

nodes.name: Escalation Card
nodes.description: Display Registrar contact details and end the flow

content.title: Office of the Registrar
content.subtitle: Our team is ready to help you.

nodes.name: Detect Intent
nodes.description: POST /chat/intent — classify the student's question into one of 6 intents

nodes.name: Intent Router
nodes.description: Route to intent-specific slot-filling nodes before calling /chat/ask

content.text: Which term are you asking about? (e.g. Fall 2026, Winter 2027)
Which fee or payment type are you asking about? (e.g. tuition, deferral plan, invoice)

nodes.name: Release Summary Slot
nodes.description: Required slot — Banner module and version are needed for summarize/full
nodes.prompt: Which Banner module and version would you like a release summary for? (e.g. Banner Student 9.3.37)

nodes.name: Call Ask API
nodes.description: POST /chat/ask — retrieve a RAG-backed answer using the classified intent

nodes.name: Low Confidence Escalation
nodes.description: Answer confidence too low — surface human contact instead

content.text:
I don't have a confident answer for that. Here's who can help:

**Office of the Registrar**
Email: registrar@college.edu | Phone: 555-0100 | Mon–Fri 8am–5pm

nodes.name: Format Answer
nodes.description: Build the answer text with inline source citations

nodes.name: Display Answer
nodes.description: Show the RAG answer with source citations

content.text: Glad I could help! Feel free to ask another question any time.
